parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: The edit field allows you to enter profile groups for profiles and/or faces to bridge. This is optional if you have regular geometric curves or surfaces, however, you must enter something here in orde

parameters.name: bridge
parameters.label: Bridge
parameters.description: Allows bridging of subgroups of N primitives or patterns of primitives.

parameters.name: inc
parameters.label: N
parameters.description: Determines the pattern of primitives to bridge using this .

parameters.name: order
parameters.label: Order
parameters.description: Sets the spline order for both profile extraction and skinning operations.

parameters.name: isodivs
parameters.label: Min X-Sections
parameters.description: The minimum number of cross-sections in the resulting skin. If you create a high-density surface, TouchDesigner's level of detail may display the surface less smoothly than it actually is. You can inc

parameters.name: frenet
parameters.label: Use
parameters.description: Specifies the type of normal to use for computing direction:

parameters.name: circular
parameters.label: Circular Arc Fillet
parameters.description: Tells TouchDesigner to try to generate a round fillet rather than a free-form fillet. Only the sign (positive or negative) of the tangent scales is used; the scale magnitude is ignored when building a

parameters.name: curvature
parameters.label: Use Curvature
parameters.description: Takes curvature into consideration as well.

parameters.name: sdivs
parameters.label: Divisions per Span
parameters.description: Number of 2-D points evaluated in each span.

parameters.name: csharp
parameters.label: Preserve Sharp Corners
parameters.description: Enables or disables fitting of sharp turns. If cracks appear in the resulting skin, is usually a good solution; however, it may add additional knots which can create undesirable "ripples" in some case

parameters.name: scalet3
parameters.label: Scalet3
parameters.description: The scaling and rotation parameters contain three fields. The rotation fields (degrees) apply further rotation to the tangents, while the scale parameter further scales the tangents.

parameters.name: rotatet3
parameters.label: Rotatet3
parameters.description: The scaling and rotation parameters contain three fields. The rotation fields (degrees) apply further rotation to the tangents, while the scale parameter further scales the tangents.

parameters.name: scalec3
parameters.label: Scalec3
parameters.description: Further scaling of the curvature.  Note: If the resulting skin bulges too greatly, you can achieve a smooth resulting transition between surfaces by disabling the Preserve Tangent & Preserve Curvature
